items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having multiple documents per credential, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. The prior steps do not address the existence or handling of multiple documents associated with a single credential, leading to an inconclusive result. Without concrete evidence or checks confirming this requirement, the validation cannot be completed.
